_comment: Pokeville — a dusty country town on Saloon Row, reached by the bus from anywhere in the Midwest once you hold a pass. The Last Lasso (venue) books country acts; The Dusty Rest (hotel) lets you crash the night when you're away from home; Chuck Wagon Diner (eat) fills you up. Scarcity beat: the General Store sells feed and picks but NO strings — stock up before you ride out.
name: Pokeville

exits.name: Pokeville General Store
exits.flavor: Pokeville General — feed, ammo, jerky, and a jar of guitar picks by the register. Strings? "Try the city, partner." (No music store out here — stock up before you ride in.)

exits.name: Wagon Wheel Records
exits.flavor: Wagon Wheel Records — a crate of warped country 45s and a sleeping cat. (Consignment in a later build.)

exits.name: Old Cassidy
exits.flavor: Old Cassidy tips his hat. "You that band from the city? Last Lasso could use some new blood. Don't scare the regulars."
